metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2275
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Over expression of EGFP-p65 allowed the investigation of the protein redistribution from the dendritic brunch to the nucleus using a FRAP approach.
Following photobleaching of a dendritic segment, authors observed fluorescence recovery which was unidirectional and triggered only by NMDA application. Accordingly, photobleaching of the somatic region shows a significant recovery after NMDA application, different from the recovery observed under basal conditions.. Experimental description: Dissociated primary hippocampal cultures were prepared from postnatal P1 mice.

There is no information whatsoever about the origin of the p65 sequence they used for their clones.

24/01/2018 Pim
- Authors contacted for species information (dd 24/01/2018
 mkm@jhmi.edu). Aswer via phone: "human"
